latHint: Think dodging a tricky question - not ice skating.
pivHint: You SKATE across the ice - but to SKATE around a question means to do what?
winText: Dodging the issue. SKATE was the pivot - ice rink sport to evading a question.
lossText: EVADE - to dodge or avoid. SKATE was the pivot: ice skating to skating around the truth.
